name: Hot Pepper Salsa
recipeInstructions:
1. Grind together the peppers, onion, and garlic.
2. Blend together the catsup, brown sugar, and vinegar.
3. Stir well and bring to a boil for 20 minutes.
4. Pack hot and seal.
Note: Use the cheapest catsup available at a warehouse grocery store. This burns easily, so keep heat low and stir often prior to canning.
